general.name: SecureW2 and SDC-CORP
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>F6FCB72F-6A57-4655-97A1-04EBD7966F21</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>F6FCB72F-6A57-4655-97A1-04EBD7966F21</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>SecureW2 and SDC-CORP</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>726119D3-634B-49C2-99D8-10D134BD0DC5</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.security.root</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>726119D3-634B-49C2-99D8-10D134BD0DC5</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Saks Device Root CA</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadCertificateFileName</key><string>Saks Device Root CA.cer</string><key>PayloadContent</key><data></data><key>AllowAllAppsAccess</key><true/><key>KeyIsExtractable</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>25E9E482-2B47-4587-A77C-3BE06F68C256</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.security.pkcs1</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>25E9E482-2B47-4587-A77C-3BE06F68C256</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Saks Jamf Intermediate CA</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadCertificateFileName</key><string>Saks Jamf Intermediate CA.cer</string><key>PayloadContent</key><data></data><key>AllowAllAppsAccess</key><true/><key>KeyIsExtractable</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>7AEFF4F1-8983-4F7B-BAEC-2799BB45BF09</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.security.root</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>7AEFF4F1-8983-4F7B-BAEC-2799BB45BF09</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>DigiCert Global Root</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadCertificateFileName</key><string>a8985d3a65e5e5c4b2d7d66d40c6dd2fb19c5436.cer</string><key>PayloadContent</key><data></data><key>AllowAllAppsAccess</key><true/><key>KeyIsExtractable</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>0006BD4A-C469-4755-A6E9-7A50D40F3368</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.security.scep</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>0006BD4A-C469-4755-A6E9-7A50D40F3368</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>SCEP (SecureW2)</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Jamf Pro Scep Proxy</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadContent</key><dict><key>Name</key><string>SecureW2</string><key>URL</key><string>https://saks.jamfcloud.com//CA/SCEP/config</string><key>ScepProxyOption</key><string>manual</string><key>Challenge</key><string>ihvn9ehlr26jr3g2roj8glv4hp</string><key>Key Type</key><string>RSA</string><key>Key Usage</key><integer>5</integer><key>Keysize</key><integer>2048</integer><key>Subject</key><array><array><array><string>CN</string><string>$COMPUTERNAME $PROFILE_IDENTIFIER</string></array></array></array><key>SubjectAltName</key><dict><key>rfc822Name</key><string>$USERNAME;;$MACADDRESS;;$UDID</string><key>ntPrincipalName</key><string/></dict><key>CertificateRenewalTimeInterval</key><integer>14</integer><key>KeyIsExtractable</key><false/><key>AllowAllAppsAccess</key><true/></dict></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>4B3EED17-4045-4FF6-A213-150130A7BA43</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.wifi.managed</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>4B3EED17-4045-4FF6-A213-150130A7BA43</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>WiFi (sdc-corp)</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>HIDDEN_NETWORK</key><false/><key>EncryptionType</key><string>WPA2</string><key>PayloadCertificateUUID</key><string>0006BD4A-C469-4755-A6E9-7A50D40F3368</string><key>AutoJoin</key><true/><key>CaptiveBypass</key><false/><key>ProxyType</key><string>None</string><key>DisableAssociationMACRandomization</key><false/><key>EAPClientConfiguration</key><dict><key>AcceptEAPTypes</key><array><integer>13</integer></array><key>TTLSInnerAuthentication</key><string>MSCHAPv2</string><key>TLSTrustedServerNames</key><array><string>*.securew2.com</string></array><key>PayloadCertificateAnchorUUID</key><array><string>7AEFF4F1-8983-4F7B-BAEC-2799BB45BF09</string></array></dict><key>SetupModes</key><array><string>System</string></array><key>SSID_STR</key><string>sdc-corp</string><key>Interface</key><string>BuiltInWireless</string></dict></array></dict></plist>
